title: Tactical Creeper
description: Adds an "innocent" baby creeper that's totally not a tactical nuke
body:
Tactical Creeper

Tactical Creepers is a mod that adds a silly little cursed baby creeper that, well, if you couldn't tell by the name, is basically a nuke.

This mod was a joke idea by flufftapes, and is also the first mod i made, so i plan to add more content in the future, as at the moment, its pretty barebones. It is pretty much unkillable at the moment with how it ignites

What's actually in the mod right now?

This silly little guy, and thats about it

Where can i find it?

they spawn rarely in deserts at night, try to avoid them though, as even getting close to them sets em' off
